ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the measurement was taken */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "pctl_2_5" REAL /* 2.5th percentile value of PM2.5 levels */,
  "pctl_25" REAL /* 25th percentile value of PM2.5 levels */,
  "pctl_50" REAL /* 50th percentile (median) value of PM2.5 levels */,
  "pctl_75" REAL /* 75th percentile value of PM2.5 levels */,
  "pctl_97_5" REAL /* 97.5th percentile value of PM2.5 levels */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES measurement_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_measurements_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement station */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_stations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement is valid (true) or invalid (false) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation check */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, citizen) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the measurement */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
